'''yajolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squamatization|squamatization]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-j-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squamatization|squamatization]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yajolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæjeleth|yæjeleth]] || [[word:yæjelej|yæjelej]] || [[word:yæjelesh|yæjelesh]] || [[word:yæjele|yæjele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yajojoloth|yajojoloth]] || [[word:yajojoloj|yajojoloj]] || [[word:yajojolosh|yajojolosh]] || [[word:yajojolo|yajojolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yajoloth|yajoloth]] || [[word:yajoloj|yajoloj]] || [[word:yajolosh|yajolosh]] || [[word:yajolo|yajolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yajofloth|yajofloth]] || [[word:yajofloj|yajofloj]] || [[word:yajoflosh|yajoflosh]] || [[word:yajoflof|yajoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yajolotho|yajolotho]] || [[word:yajolojo|yajolojo]] || [[word:yajolosho|yajolosho]] || [[word:yajoloko|yajoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yajoloth|yajoloth]] || [[word:yajoloj|yajoloj]] || [[word:yajolosh|yajolosh]] || [[word:yajolo|yajolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yajolothol|yajolothol]] || [[word:yajolojol|yajolojol]] || [[word:yajoloshol|yajoloshol]] || [[word:yajolokol|yajolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yajolothotho|yajolothotho]] || [[word:yajolojojo|yajolojojo]] || [[word:yajoloshosho|yajoloshosho]] || [[word:yajoloko|yajoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yajolothon|yajolothon]] || [[word:yajolojon|yajolojon]] || [[word:yajoloshon|yajoloshon]] || [[word:yajolokon|yajolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yajolothoro|yajolothoro]] || [[word:yajolojoro|yajolojoro]] || [[word:yajoloshoro|yajoloshoro]] || [[word:yajolokoro|yajolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
